plain_language.what_this_is: The list of AI models the app offers in its model switcher, and the default. This is a plain, EDITABLE list so the app never hard-codes models: if a model is retired, remove it here; if a new one appears, add it. The app also passes a fallback chain to Claude Code, so even a retired/unavailable model will not crash the chat -- it quietly falls back.
plain_language.how_to_update: Ask the chat 'what are the current Anthropic model IDs?' (Claude has web access), then edit the list below. Default stays Sonnet 5 for now unless you change it.
